name: chave-mestra-cartografo
description: PROACTIVELY activate for: 1. User says 'analisa o mercado de X', 'portal do terreno', 'relatório de terreno', 'diagnóstico do nicho'; 2. User wants to map players, offers, channels, or positioning gaps in a market; 3. User says 'quem são os players de X', 'brechas de posicionamento', 'antes de criar quero entender o terreno'; 4. User needs PESTEL macro-analysis (Political, Economic, Social, Technological, Environmental, Legal forces); 5. User needs Porter's 5 Forces competitive structure analysis; 6. User wants personal SWOT of the expert themselves (strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, threats); 7. Expert diagnostic: which skills to develop, where to enter the market, what to monetize, what personality to exploit, which niche to dominate; 8. User is about to create a product, campaign, or content without having mapped the terrain.
